sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112173" key="foru/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορύη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, name of Titan, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:123:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123.3</biblScope> </bibl> (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φορύνω</foreign>(?)).</entryFree>
